title: logania vaginalis
intro: Logania vaginalis is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Logania vaginalis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and soothe irritated tissues in the throat and lungs. Logania vaginalis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular remedy in traditional Australian medicine.
